scripts.check:py: uv run python -m py_compile database/runtime_config.py database/setup_indices.py database/materialize.py database/demo_reset.py database/db_flush.py database/seed_data.py database/generate_embeddings.py scripts/sync_arcade_secrets.py tools/src/redis_mcp/runtime_contract.py tools/src/redis_mcp/indexing.py tools/src/redis_mcp/redisvl_gateway.py tools/src/redis_mcp/server.py
